---
name: Bug report
about: Create a bug report to help me improve the project
title: "[BUG] <Bug title here>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Mode of operation**
What did you try to achieve? Which conversion did you use?

**System information**
- Minecraft version
- Server version
- Server type (Bukkit, Paper, Spigot, ...)
- more ...  

**Logs or Screenshots**
If applicable, add logs (or screenshots) to help explain your problem.
Please be sure to remove any information you don't want publicly know.
Playernames/UUIDs should be non problematic and are very helpful for me when debugging.
